title: Careers
questions: It is impossible to have a successful career and a happy family life. You have to choose one or the other. Do you agree?
How important is it to have a good (well-paid/secure) job?
What advice would you give a young person today?
Would you encourage your children to accept a job in another country?
Would you be disappointed if your children: left school early? chose a manual job?
Can you describe your career path so far?
What are your future career plans?
Are you happy with how your career is progressing?
How did you decide on your current profession?
How did you get interested in that area? Were you interested in similar things as a child?
Did you choose a job compatible with your interests?
Did you end up in your profession by chance or by choice?
Are you ambitious in terms of your career?
Do you get the chance to use your talents in your job?
Have you ever changed careers? Why? What was your motivation?
What are the fastest growing professions in your country?
If you had to change jobs what field would you go into?
Which professions will still exist in 50 years? Which will not exist?
